<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Ceftolozane 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：See EMA product information</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>urinary tract infection (disease)（99.9%）</li>
<li>gonococcal urethritis（99.9%）</li>
<li>Ureaplasma urethritis（99.9%）</li>
<li>uterine inflammatory disease（99.9%）</li>
<li>xanthogranulomatous pyelonephritis（99.9%）</li>
<li>hyperamylasemia（99.5%）</li>
<li>polyclonal hyperviscosity syndrome（99.5%）</li>
<li>urogenital tuberculosis（99.5%）</li>
<li>congenital analbuminemia（99.4%）</li>
<li>blood group incompatibility（99.2%）</li>
<li>premalignant hematological system disease（99.1%）</li>
<li>monoclonal gammopathy（99.1%）</li>
<li>hematological disease associated with an acquired peripheral neuropathy（99.0%）</li>
<li>congenital hematological disorder（98.6%）</li>
<li>septicemic plague（98.5%）</li>
<li>epiglottitis（98.1%）</li>
<li>hematopoietic and lymphoid system neoplasm（97.6%）</li>
<li>pyelitis（96.4%）</li>
<li>laryngitis（96.4%）</li>
<li>abdominal tuberculosis（95.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
